Patch Set 2: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Seems like safe changes to me. Thanks for the patch.

Patch Set 2: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

I don't know how mdt helpers work, but I find the replacement is not complete.

For example, in mdt_connect_internal() there are still two places using mdt_md_dev.md_lu_dev.ld_obd->obd_name.

CWARN("%s: MDS requires FID support, but client not\n", mdt->mdt_md_dev.md_lu_dev.ld_obd->obd_name);

Patch Set 2:

I will add them and publish a new patch
Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 3: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

I just tried the command "grep "mdt2obd_dev(" * -n -R | grep "obd_name"" and found that a place can be replaced with mdt_obd_name in mdt_fini()
server_put_mount(mdt2obd_dev(m)->obd_name, NULL);

Could you please run grep to have a double check after running mdt helpers? Thanks.
Uploaded patch set 4.

Patch Set 4:

I made the grep and add a change for another helper mdt_lu_site()

parents.subject: LU-3000 tests: several fixes of tests for DNE

commit.subject: LU-2747 mdt: use of mdt_XXX helpers
commit.message:
LU-2747 mdt: use of mdt_XXX helpers

replace explicit use of some obd fields by mdt helpers:
mdt_obd_name() mdt2obd_dev() mdt_lu_site() mdt_seq_site()

Signed-off-by: JC Lafoucriere <jacques-charles.lafoucriere@cea.fr>
Change-Id: I1a67145478a143bf6444c9a248c5cc213dc91687
